title: DSEG7
description: Adds the DSEG7 font (by keshikan) that imitates a seven-segment display as a font and banner patterns.
body:
This mod adds the **[DSEG7 font by keshikan](https://www.keshikan.net/fonts-e.html) that imitates a seven-segment display**, as well as **43 banner patterns**: 39 based on the characters, and 4 for single segments that don't correspond to a character *(the remaining 3 individual segments are i, -, _)*.

The font can be used by any [JSON text](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Text_component_format) (it has id `dseg7:dseg7`), such as with the `/tellraw` or `/title` commands on in custom item names. If you have [Bookshelf](https://modrinth.com/mod/bookshelf-lib), you can also use the `/bookshelf font` command for easy uses.

The font supports:
* All 26 latin letters A to Z (upper and lowercase are displayed the same),
* All 10 arabic numerals 0 to 9,
* Dash (-), dot (.), colon (:), underscore (_) and degree (°).

**To get the banner patterns, craft the Banner Pattern item** and use it in a Loom, as you would with any other. It is crafted with one each of Paper, Redstone, and Glowstone.

![Screenshot of all 43 banner patterns.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jtToH2NW/images/51ebd072cb7a805f2a1204d1d006d0bc6e150eb3.png)

This was inspired by Darkhax's font mods, such as [Nyctography](https://modrinth.com/mod/nyctography).
